recent_calls.summary: The user, Quintelle, called but decided to call back during normal business hours to speak with CG, indicating no urgency. The agent offered to take a message or arrange a callback, but the user declined and ended the call politely.

The user called to inquire about the whereabouts of their technician but was unclear and frustrated during the brief conversation. The agent attempted to clarify the issue but the call ended abruptly with the user hanging up.

The user, Charles Zini, called after hours to request an estimate for replacing his air conditioner and furnace due to coolant loss. The agent collected his contact information and service address, confirmed details, and arranged for a team member to call him back to discuss the estimate. Charles declined information about maintenance programs.

The user inquired about the types of equipment Budget sells, specifically asking about Trane equipment. The agent explained that Budget primarily installs brands like Lennox, Goodman, and Empire, and does not typically install Trane systems. The call ended abruptly as the user expressed frustration.

The user, Decarla, called after hours to follow up on an insurance claim related to her air conditioner. She had previously received an estimate and wanted to discuss the final outcome. The agent documented her information and assured her that a representative would call her back on the next business day.

The user, Puline, called to request a callback regarding ongoing issues with her air conditioning that were not resolved despite a recent service visit. The agent confirmed the callback number and informed her that a representative would call back on the next business day since live transfers were not available after 4:00 pm. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user, Brenda, called to inquire about the efficiency rating of a system quoted by Jeff and requested a callback to discuss options for higher efficiency models. She also asked about participation in home forgiveness programs through the city of O'Fallon. The agent confirmed the details and arranged for Jeff or a team member to contact Brenda the next business day.
The user requested to speak to a human agent, and the call was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to report a recurring air conditioning issue covered under their American Home Shield home warranty, requesting an emergency service appointment for today. The agent confirmed the details, including the dispatch number and correct service address, and informed the user that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback on the call experience.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user called to report that their scheduled AC service appointment was missed, and no one had contacted them or arrived. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and requested to speak to Nick. The agent attempted to transfer the call to Nick and successfully completed the transfer.
The user requested to speak to a real person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called customer service and the agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user requested to speak to a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user, Catherine Bryan, called to check on her appointment scheduled for today between 1:00 and 2:00 p.m. with technician Rich. The agent confirmed the appointment details and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance as the technician had not arrived yet.

The agent informed the user about Humana Medicare Advantage plans that offer extra benefits, including a zero dollar monthly plan and a prepaid card for over-the-counter items. The user did not respond during the call, which lasted 41 seconds before the user hung up.

The user called to confirm their scheduled appointment and was informed that the appointment with technician Amory is set for today between 1:00 and 2:00 p.m. The user expressed concern about not hearing from the technician yet, and the agent transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user expressed frustration with an automated system and requested to speak with a live agent. The agent acknowledged the frustration and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to resolve an issue with approving a new estimate for a tankless water heater after already approving an estimate for a tank water heater. The agent confirmed the details and attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The user requested a person to speak with directly.
The user returned a call from Budget and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call lasted briefly and ended with a transfer.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully.
The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 14 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.
The user requested to speak to a live operator, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

Dustin called to follow up on an air conditioning estimate provided by Jeff and expressed interest in moving forward with the work, needing to coordinate with a roofing contractor and landlord. The agent confirmed Dustin's details, discussed scheduling options for the following week, and assured that someone from the team would follow up to coordinate the service. Dustin acknowledged the available time slots and agreed to speak with the team when they call.
The user called to inquire about the status of their air conditioner installation and repair. The agent confirmed the user's request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to return a call from someone in the office. The agent acknowledged and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to another agent successfully. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called customer service and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without completing any service interaction herself.
The user called to schedule a service after receiving a message, provided their ZIP code, and requested to speak to a live agent. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called about a service request approved by their home warranty, mentioning a heating issue and replacement in progress. The agent asked for the home warranty dispatch number and preferred appointment time, but the user did not provide the dispatch number before ending the call. The user indicated open availability for the appointment.

The user called to schedule a service appointment related to their home warranty for both heating and cooling systems. The agent gathered necessary information and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Joseph called to schedule an evaporator coil cleaning recommended after a recent air conditioner tune-up. The agent confirmed the service details and booked an appointment for Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Joseph was satisfied with the interaction and provided positive feedback.

The user called to confirm that the contractor was present at the location. The agent acknowledged the update and offered further assistance, but the user declined additional help and ended the call politely.

The user, Milton Guzman, a property manager, called to report a loose tub faucet in a tenant's unit and requested a service appointment. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that no immediate time slots were available, but the team would contact him to schedule the appointment. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.

Susan called to schedule a furnace service appointment through American Home Shield, describing that the furnace blows air but produces no heat. The agent confirmed the details and informed Susan that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. The call ended with the agent transferring Susan to a live agent for further assistance.

Rafael called to confirm that he had not missed the technician's arrival and requested to be called when the technician is en route for a routine inspection of his central air unit. The agent confirmed the details, offered available appointment slots, and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.
No conversation happened.
The user returned a call from Sophie and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Michael Wilson, called to confirm a delivery of a skin of Freon to 325 Mid Rivers Mall Drive, Saint Peters, Missouri, ZIP code 63376. The agent collected all necessary delivery details including the user's role, company, estimated arrival time, and contact information. The call ended after confirming the delivery summary with the user.

The user reported that their air conditioning was not working and requested to add this issue to an existing service appointment on Monday morning. The agent successfully booked the appointment for Monday, April 6th at 8:00 a.m. The user provided feedback rating the AI assistant as 3 and requested to speak with a live agent, after which the call was transferred to a live agent.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond initial greetings between the agent and the user. No specific information or requests were exchanged.

The user called to cancel an air conditioning service appointment scheduled for Friday between 8 and 12. The agent confirmed the details and noted the cancellation, then offered information about maintenance programs, which the user accepted. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback and a polite closing.
The user returned a call they received and was connected to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent transferred the call to another agent to handle the user's needs.
The user called after missing a scheduling call and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.
